checks.question: Did the work fully address the issue hints, user notes, and approved plan requirements?

findings.detail: Re-ran the milestone-start inventory with `rg -n "@base-ui/react/(dialog|popover|select|menu|tooltip|alert-dialog|context-menu|popup|preview-card)" src` and confirmed the revised plan now matches the repo: there are 10 current `src/` matches, including the test-only `src/shared/components/ui/tooltipPrimitives.test.tsx` mock and the type-only import in `src/shared/components/ui/command.tsx`, both of which the plan now explicitly includes in the cleanup story.

Checked the approved scope against the actual repository surface and found no `@base-ui/react/context-menu` usage anywhere under `src/`. The revised plan sensibly pivots to the real repo owners, but it never explicitly reconciles that with the brief's in-scope ContextMenu wrapper requirement, so the gate is left to infer whether ContextMenu is intentionally N/A or silently dropped.

checks.question: Are the proposed changes technically correct?

findings.detail: Verified the non-modal rule against current callers and wrappers. `src/shared/components/ui/hover-card.tsx` is the existing `PreviewCard` owner, and the revised plan now explicitly marks tooltip and preview-card entries as `modal: false` with no `restoreFocusTo`, which matches how current hover/focus overlays are used and resolves the earlier focus-restoration risk.

Overlay precedence: `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useLightboxShellInteractionHandlers.ts` still has a separate `targetHasHigherZIndex()` path that walks ancestors and compares computed `z-index` values against `UI_Z_LAYERS.LIGHTBOX_MODAL`. Step 7 says this hook will stop using `hasDialogAbove()` and move to stack-based topmost checks, but it never says how this second computed-style branch is removed or replaced, so the plan can satisfy its named migration while still leaving one DOM/z-index precedence mechanism in the lightbox path.

checks.question: Search for related code that handles the same concept. Is the reported issue a symptom of something broader?

findings.detail: Searched the broader overlay subsystem and the revised plan now tracks the real repository shape rather than the original "20+ callsites" premise: raw Base UI ownership is concentrated in shared wrappers plus `LightboxShell.tsx`, and the plan covers the broader supporting layers around marker helpers, `uiLayers.ts`, and layering escape hatches instead of treating the Model Select regression as a one-off caller bug.

checks.question: Does the change touch all locations AND supporting infrastructure?

findings.detail: Re-grepped the popup-marker and overlay-marker surface with `rg -n "\[role=\"listbox\"\]|\[role=\"menu\"\]|\[data-side\]|\[data-popup\]|\[data-dialog-content\]|\[data-lightbox-popup\]" src/shared src/domains src/tools` and confirmed the revised plan now names every current open-coded helper consumer I found: `useSlidingPane.ts`, `CommunityLorasTab.tsx`, `MyLorasTab.tsx`, `sharedSections.tsx`, `elementPolicy.ts`, `useMobileInteractions.ts`, `GuidanceVideoStrip.tsx`, `useLightboxTransition.ts`, and the `uiLayers.ts` marker queries.

checks.question: Find the callers of the changed function. What arguments do they actually pass? Does the fix handle all of them?

findings.detail: Checked the previously-missed forwarded layering path and the revised plan now follows the actual caller chain: `src/shared/components/selectors/ShotSelectorWithAdd.tsx` passes `tooltipClassName="z-[100001]"` into `src/shared/components/shots/ShotPrimaryActionButton.tsx`, which forwards it to `TooltipContent`, and Step 9 now explicitly lists both files so the cleanup is no longer limited to direct JSX consumers.

flags.concern: Overlay precedence: `useLightboxShellInteractionHandlers.ts` still contains `targetHasHigherZIndex()`, a separate computed-z-index gate that Step 7 does not explicitly retire, so the plan can leave one DOM/z-index precedence branch in place even after migrating `hasDialogAbove()` callers.
flags.evidence: The hook compares `window.getComputedStyle(element).zIndex` against `UI_Z_LAYERS.LIGHTBOX_MODAL` at `src/domains/media-lightbox/hooks/useLightboxShellInteractionHandlers.ts:13-22,39-102`, while Step 7 only names replacing `hasDialogAbove()` with stack-based checks.

flags.concern: Criterion 17: requires human verification (drive_browser, inspect_runtime_ui, verify_physical_device).
